sections.heading: Secs. 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a. Uniform Commercial Code–Bulk Transfers.
Sec. 42a-6-110b. Validity and enforceability of rights and obligations arising under former provisions on bulk transfers.

body: Rights and obligations that arose under sections 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a , inclusive, and section 42a-9-111 before their repeal on October 1, 1993, remain valid and may be enforced as though those sections had not been repealed.
content.plainText: Rights and obligations that arose under sections 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a , inclusive, and section 42a-9-111 before their repeal on October 1, 1993, remain valid and may be enforced as though those sections had not been repealed.

body: Secs. 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a. Uniform Commercial Code–Bulk Transfers. Sections 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a , inclusive, are repealed.
content.plainText: Secs. 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a. Uniform Commercial Code–Bulk Transfers. Sections 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a , inclusive, are repealed.

body: Secs. 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a. Uniform Commercial Code–Bulk Transfers. Sections 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a , inclusive, are repealed.
content.plainText: Secs. 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a. Uniform Commercial Code–Bulk Transfers. Sections 42a-6-101 to 42a-6-110a , inclusive, are repealed.
